synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-21843 Important: Oracle Linux 10 thunderbird security update
description:
[140.5.0-2.0.1]
- Add Oracle prefs

[140.5.0-2]

full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-21843
